task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the wiring diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal window is open displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/wiring_diagram.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the parameter configuration section of the flight control software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl (or similar flight controller software) is open, and the agent has navigated to the 'Parameters' or 'Vehicle Setup' menu where serial/UART settings can be modified.

task_completion.description: Verify SERIAL3 protocol and baud rate are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the parameter list or search results, 'SERIAL3_PROTOCOL' is set to '2' and 'SERIAL3_BAUD' is set to '921'.

task_completion.description: Verify SERIAL4 protocol and baud rate are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the parameter list or search results, 'SERIAL4_PROTOCOL' is set to '32' and 'SERIAL4_BAUD' is set to '115'.

task_completion.description: Verify SERIAL5 protocol and baud rate are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the parameter list or search results, 'SERIAL5_PROTOCOL' is set to '16' and 'SERIAL5_BAUD' is set to '115'.

task_completion.description: Verify SERIAL6 protocol and baud rate are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the parameter list or search results, 'SERIAL6_PROTOCOL' is set to '9' and 'SERIAL6_BAUD' is set to '19'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the flight controller software GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGroundControl's parameter editor interface, rather than just running a background script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent retrieved the values from the provided schematic.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen explicitly opening or reading '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/wiring_diagram.txt' at least once during the trajectory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just type the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter values are entered into the actual parameter fields of the flight control software, not just written into a blank text document or terminal echo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The wiring diagram specifies the following exact parameter values that must be set: SERIAL3_PROTOCOL = 2, SERIAL3_BAUD = 921, SERIAL4_PROTOCOL = 32, SERIAL4_BAUD = 115, SERIAL5_PROTOCOL = 16, SERIAL5_BAUD = 115, SERIAL6_PROTOCOL = 9, SERIAL6_BAUD = 19.
